    H

    hand - Variable in class whistapp.domain.players.Player
    The hand of this player.
    Hand - Class in whistapp.domain.cards
    Represents a hand of cards in the game of Whist.
    Hand(ArrayList) - Constructor for class whistapp.domain.cards.Hand
    A constructor for a Hand of a player.
    hasBeenProposed() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    A simple method checking if some player has bid the proposal bid.
    hasSuit(Suit) - Method in class whistapp.domain.cards.Hand
    A simple checker to see if this hand has a card of a given suit.
    HEARTS - Enum constant in enum class whistapp.domain.cards.Suit
     
    HIGH - Enum constant in enum class whistapp.domain.players.BotDifficulty
     
    HighBot - Class in whistapp.domain.players
    Represents a bot player that plays high cards.
    HighBot(String) - Constructor for class whistapp.domain.players.HighBot
